mapper.select: SELECT requested_limit FROM transfer_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customer_id} AND out_account_number = #{out_account_number} AND transfer_type = '한도' ORDER BY request_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(amount), 0) FROM transaction_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customer_id} AND transaction_type = '출금' AND DATE(transaction_date) = CURDATE()
